ValidationRule.description: Case Category,case detail is mandatory for closing the case for all countries excluding France & Hungary.
ValidationRule.errorConditionFormula: AND(NOT( $User.Bypass_Validation_Rules__c ), OR(RecordType.DeveloperName = 'Case_External_United_Kingdom', RecordType.DeveloperName = 'Case_External_Germany', RecordType.DeveloperName = 'Case_External_Finland', RecordType.DeveloperName = 'Case_External_Denmark', RecordType.DeveloperName = 'Case_External_Ireland', RecordType.DeveloperName = 'Case_External_Poland', RecordType.DeveloperName = 'Case_External_Luxembourg', RecordType.Id = '01220000000Uo97', RecordType.Id ='0120Q0000003A22', RecordType.Id ='0120Q0000003A21', RecordType.Id ='01220000000MKGP', RecordType.Id ='01220000000MEGh', RecordType.Id ='01220000000V4TZ', RecordType.Id ='01220000000MJoa', RecordType.Id ='01220000000V4TF', RecordType.Id ='0123X000000a3TD', RecordType.Id ='0123X000000Nfr8', RecordType.Id ='01220000000MDhj', RecordType.Id ='01220000000V02r', RecordType.Id ='0120O000000KFnJ', RecordType.Id ='0123X000000NgfN', RecordType.Id ='0120O000000KFj7', RecordType.Id ='0120O000000KFi4', RecordType.Id ='0120O000000ksIG', RecordType.Id ='012200000009CuR', RecordType.Id ='0120O000000KFnT', RecordType.Id ='0120O000000KFnd', RecordType.Id ='01220000000V2lN', RecordType.Id ='0123X000000a3TI', RecordType.Id ='01220000000MLar', RecordType.Id ='0120O000000KFjM', RecordType.Id ='01220000000E0aO', RecordType.Id ='01220000000MJtz', RecordType.Id ='01220000000MFwy', RecordType.Id ='01220000000MG1A', RecordType.Id ='01220000000V39B', RecordType.Id ='01220000000MGh8', RecordType.Id ='01220000000MSgZ', RecordType.Id ='01220000000MH1Y', RecordType.Id ='0122000000005p0', RecordType.Id ='01220000000MEPK'), OR(ISPICKVAL(External_Case_Detail__c, ""), ISPICKVAL(External_Case_Category__c, ""), AND(ISPICKVAL(Type,""), ISPICKVAL(External_Case_Type__c,""))), ISPICKVAL (Status , 'Closed') )
ValidationRule.errorMessage: Case Category ,Case Detail & (Type or Case type) is mandatory .
